definition: Entertainment; pleasure.
example: We need to understand the concept of entertain.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm giải trí.

definition: An activity designed to give pleasure, enjoyment, diversion, amusement, or relaxation to an audience, no matter whether the audience participates passively as in watching opera or a movie, or actively as in games.
example: We need to understand the concept of entertainment.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm giải trí.

definition: A recorded sequence of images displayed on a screen at a rate sufficiently fast to create the appearance of motion.
example: We need to understand the concept of movie.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về phim.

definition: A thin layer of some substance; a pellicle; a membranous covering, causing opacity.
example: a clear plastic film for wrapping food
exampleVi: màng nhựa trong để bọc thực phẩm

definition: A movie theatre, a movie house
example: The cinema is right across the street from the restaurant.
exampleVi: Rạp chiếu phim nằm ngay đối diện nhà hàng.

definition: A place or building, consisting of a stage and seating, in which an audience gathers to watch plays, musical performances, public ceremonies, and so on.
example: We need to understand the concept of theatre.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm sân khấu.

definition: Activity for amusement only, especially among the young.
example: Children learn through play.
exampleVi: Trẻ học thông qua vui chơi.

definition: A person who performs, plays a part in a theatrical play or film.
example: We need to understand the concept of actor.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm diễn viên.

definition: A female who performs on the stage or in films.
example: We need to understand the concept of actress.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm diễn viên.

definition: One who directs; the person in charge of managing a department or directorate (e.g., director of engineering), project, or production (as in a show or film, e.g., film director).
example: We need to understand the concept of director.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm giám đốc.

definition: A series of sounds organized in time, employing melody, harmony, tempo etc. usually to convey a mood.
example: I keep listening to this music because it's a masterpiece.
exampleVi: Tôi tiếp tục nghe nhạc này vì nó là một kiệt tác.

definition: A musical composition with lyrics for voice or voices, performed by singing.
example: Thomas listened to his favorite song on the radio yesterday.
exampleVi: Hôm qua Thomas đã nghe bài hát yêu thích của mình trên radio.

definition: A person who sings, often professionally.
example: We need to understand the concept of singer.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm ca sĩ.

definition: A strip of material used for strengthening or coupling.
example: We need to understand the concept of band.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm ban nhạc.

definition: Agreement in a design or plan; union formed by mutual communication of opinions and views; accordance in a scheme; harmony; simultaneous action.
example: We need to understand the concept of concert.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về buổi hòa nhạc.

definition: A sequence of rhythmic steps or movements usually performed to music, for pleasure or as a form of social interaction.
example: We need to understand the concept of dance.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm khiêu vũ.

definition: A playful or competitive activity.
example: We need to understand the concept of game.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm trò chơi.

definition: Something to play with, especially as intended for use by a child.
example: A grown man does not play with a child’s toy.
exampleVi: Người lớn không chơi đồ chơi của trẻ con.

definition: A play, dance, or other entertainment.
example: We need to understand the concept of show.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm trình diễn.

definition: The act of performing; carrying into execution or action; execution; achievement; accomplishment; representation by action.
example: the performance of an undertaking or a duty
exampleVi: việc thực hiện một cam kết hoặc một nghĩa vụ

definition: A place or building, consisting of a stage and seating, in which an audience gathers to watch plays, musical performances, public ceremonies, and so on.
example: We need to understand the concept of theater.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm sân khấu.

definition: A theater, auditorium, arena, or other area designated for sporting or entertainment events.
example: We need to understand the concept of venue.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm địa điểm.

definition: A building or institution dedicated to the acquisition, conservation, study, exhibition, and educational interpretation of objects having scientific, historical, cultural or artistic value.
example: We need to understand the concept of museum.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bảo tàng.

definition: Any of a number of festivals held just before the beginning of Lent.
example: Carnival of Brazil
exampleVi: Lễ hội Brazil

definition: An event or community gathering, usually staged by a local community, which centers on some theme, sometimes on some unique aspect of the community.
example: We need to understand the concept of festival.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm lễ hội.

definition: A large room for public meetings or performances.
example: We need to understand the concept of auditorium.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm khán phòng.

definition: Entertainment.
example: We need to understand the concept of amusement.

definition: An institution, building, or room for the exhibition and conservation of works of art.
example: We need to understand the concept of gallery.

definition: An instance of exhibiting.
example: We need to understand the concept of exhibit.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm triển lãm.

definition: A performing engagement by a musical group; or, generally, any job or role, especially for a musician or performer.
example: Hey, when are we gonna get that hotel gig again?
exampleVi: Này, khi nào chúng ta mới có lại buổi biểu diễn ở khách sạn đó?

definition: A drama or similar work, in which the main character is brought to ruin or otherwise suffers the extreme consequences of some tragic flaw or weakness of character.
example: We need to understand the concept of tragedy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bi kịch.

definition: A classical form of dance.
example: We need to understand the concept of ballet.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm múa ba lê.

definition: The act of reciting (the repetition of something that has been memorized); rehearsal
example: We need to understand the concept of recital.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về recital.

definition: A theatrical work, combining drama, music, song and sometimes dance.
example: We need to understand the concept of opera.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm opera.
